blocking_evidence: Engine build sheet, compression ratio, cam, fuel, distributor/ignition type, dyno or period prep data
next_action: Capture engine build and ignition hardware before setting timing.

blocking_evidence: Cam card, lifter type, rocker ratio, head/valvetrain documentation; S024 supports head identification only and does not provide lash values
next_action: Inspect cam/valvetrain records before advising lash.

blocking_evidence: Head documentation, plug reach/seat, compression, ignition box/coil, fuel type; S024 supports head identification only and does not provide plug specifications
next_action: Verify head plug spec and ignition system.

blocking_evidence: Carburetor model/series, choke size, emulsion tubes, jets, fuel pressure, linkage condition, engine build sheet; S018 only supports Weber IDA documentation/parts path after model verification
next_action: Document carburetor stack before adjustment; if Weber IDA is confirmed, obtain exact diagram/service literature through S018.

blocking_evidence: Pump/regulator IDs, carburetor spec, gauge calibration, line routing, leak status
next_action: Measure with known-good gauge after leak inspection and carburetor identification.

blocking_evidence: Dry/wet sump layout, tank/sump, cooler, filter, pump, builder data; S015 includes lubrication/capacity fields but leaves actionable values blank
next_action: Map oil system before filling or recommending oil.

blocking_evidence: Engine clearances, pump/relief setup, oiling layout, builder data; S015 does not provide oil-pressure targets
next_action: Prime and verify pressure only after system identification.

setting: transaxle oil type and fill quantity
blocking_evidence: Transaxle make/model/serial and service manual; S016 applies only if LG500/LG600 applicability is verified and provides refill distribution only, not a promoted oil type or total quantity
next_action: Identify unit and obtain service data; if LG500/LG600 applicability is confirmed, use S016's two-filler-hole refill method only after the oil type and total quantity are verified from the manual and installed unit.

blocking_evidence: Transaxle/differential model, gear stack, differential type, service manual; S016 cautions require matched gear pairs, correct selector setup, and matched crown wheel/pinion
next_action: Do not adjust until unit is identified and source applicability is confirmed.

applicability: Installed suspension, wheels, tires, use case
blocking_evidence: Chassis identity, pickup points, shims, uprights, tires, ride height, use case; S015 verifies independent/coil suspension only and does not provide geometry or alignment values
next_action: Record as-found geometry before applying targets.

blocking_evidence: Chassis identity, spring/damper/bar data, tire data, fuel/driver ballast, use case; S015 does not provide ride height, spring rate, damper, anti-roll-bar, or corner-weight values
next_action: Record as-found with known fuel load and ballast.

setting: brake bias and master cylinder sizing
blocking_evidence: Calipers, discs, pad compound, master cylinders, pedal ratio, balance bar, tire data; S015 confirms hydraulic brakes but leaves dimensions/settings blank
next_action: Map system before pressure/bias adjustment.

blocking_evidence: Wheel/hub/nut manufacturer, thread direction, lubricant condition, service data; S015 does not populate wheel attachment details
next_action: Identify hardware before torque recommendation.

blocking_evidence: Tire model, age, construction, wheel size, vehicle weight, use case, tire maker data; S015 does not provide tire data
next_action: Record tire details and intended use.

blocking_evidence: Wiring diagram, alternator/generator, loads, wire gauges, protection devices; S015 includes generator/battery fields but leaves actionable values blank
next_action: Map harness before energizing or resizing protection.

blocking_evidence: Harness map, battery location, alternator/generator, event rules, safety-system documentation; S015 does not provide a master-switch or circuit-breaker layout
next_action: Use FIA period context as prompt, then verify current event requirements.

applicability: Installed steering rack, column, uprights, arms, wheels, tires, and ride height
blocking_evidence: Rack make/ratio, steering-arm geometry, column/joint condition, stops, ride height, wheel/tire package, bump-steer measurement; S015 steering fields are blank
next_action: Document rack/column/upright/steering-arm identifiers and measure bump steer before adjustment.

applicability: Competition or track use under historic-event rules
blocking_evidence: Current event regulations, HTP/period classification, installed safety equipment IDs/dates, battery/master-switch function, fuel tank/foam/caps/lines, bulkheads, extinguisher/fire system, belts/anchors, ROPS, mirrors, warning light
next_action: Build a safety evidence packet and check against the event's current regulations before declaring ready.

blocking_evidence: Battery chemistry/location/cover/terminal protection, master-switch type/location/marking, alternator/generator shutdown behavior, fire-system circuit exception, inside/outside accessibility
next_action: Test and document master-switch behavior with installed charging and ignition systems before energizing unknown wiring.

blocking_evidence: Tank/cell type/date/capacity, foam or safety tank evidence, fuel-cap secondary retention, fuel-line material/pressure rating/fittings/routing, bulkhead condition, event rules
next_action: Inspect and document tank, foam/cell, fillers, vents, lines, and bulkheads before filling or pressure testing.

applicability: Installed belts, seat, anchorages, and optional FHR use
blocking_evidence: Harness FIA standard/date, manufacturer instructions, routing angles, anchor locations/plates/bolts, seat pass-throughs, chafe points, collision/damage history, event FHR requirement
next_action: Photograph and measure belt routing/anchorages; replace any damaged, degraded, rusted, deformed, or imperfectly functioning harness.

applicability: Installed suspension, tires, ride height, and use case
blocking_evidence: Spring rates/free lengths, damper make/model/serial and valving/click positions, anti-roll-bar diameter/blade/arm/link geometry, motion ratios, corner weights, tire construction, use case; S015 leaves stabiliser and shock-absorber fields blank
next_action: Identify and record springs, dampers, bars, links, and as-found positions before recommending rates, clicks, preload, or bar settings.

setting: fastener torque values and torque sequence
applicability: Any chassis, engine, suspension, brake, wheel, driveline, or safety fastener
blocking_evidence: Exact fastener location, material, grade/specification, thread, lubrication, locking method, component manufacturer/source, repair history, and reuse/replace rule; current captured sources do not provide car-wide torque tables
next_action: Do not tighten by generic tables; identify the component and applicable source before applying torque.

blocking_evidence: Engine build sheet, rotating assembly, valve springs, cam, oiling, ignition, fuel, dyno or period prep data; S015 verifies the 302 evolution but not safe operating RPM
next_action: Keep rev-limit guidance blocked until the rotating assembly, valvetrain, oiling, and build records are known.

setting: float level idle mixture pump volume and linkage synchronization
blocking_evidence: Exact carburetor model/series, Weber manual applicability, float/needle/seat data, jet stack, pump jets, linkage geometry, engine build, and fuel pressure; S018 is a source path only until carburetors are identified
next_action: Photograph carburetors and linkage; obtain exact Weber literature before float, pump, mixture, or synchronization settings.

setting: oil relief setting and priming procedure
blocking_evidence: Pump/relief hardware, wet/dry-sump layout, filter/cooler routing, engine clearances, builder procedure, and pressure history; S015 leaves lubrication fields blank
next_action: Map oil circuit and relief hardware before priming or changing relief settings.

setting: coolant capacity cap pressure thermostat restrictor and bleed method
blocking_evidence: Radiator, water pump, hoses, cap, thermostat/restrictor, fan, bleed layout, coolant type, and pressure-test results; S015 leaves cooling fields blank
next_action: Document cooling layout and pressure-test condition before coolant capacity, cap, thermostat, restrictor, or bleed guidance.

applicability: Installed transaxle, engine, tires, and use case
blocking_evidence: Transaxle identity, gear stack, crown wheel/pinion, tire diameter, engine torque curve, intended event/use, and service manual; S016 applies only to verified LG500/LG600 units
next_action: Record existing ratios and transaxle identity before ratio or final-drive recommendations.

applicability: Installed clutch, flywheel, bellhousing, release bearing, hydraulics, and transaxle
blocking_evidence: Clutch disc/cover/flywheel IDs, input spline, release bearing, slave/master cylinders, pedal ratio, linkage geometry, free play, and service source
next_action: Identify clutch and release components before pedal, free-play, or bleeding assumptions.

setting: brake fluid pad bedding and pressure targets
blocking_evidence: Caliper/disc/pad/master IDs, seal compatibility, fluid history, balance mechanism, pedal ratio, ducting, tire data, pad maker instructions, and pressure-test data; S015 leaves brake dimensions blank
next_action: Map brake system and identify pad/fluid requirements before bedding, pressure, or fluid recommendations.

setting: wheel bearing hub preload or end float
applicability: Installed hubs bearings uprights and wheels
blocking_evidence: Hub/upright/bearing/nut/retainer IDs, bearing type, service manual, lubrication condition, heat history, and wheel/tire package; S015 does not provide hub service settings
next_action: Identify hub and bearing hardware before preload, end-float, or bearing-service guidance.

setting: gauge sender calibration and warning thresholds
applicability: Installed instruments senders and engine systems
blocking_evidence: Gauge make/range, sender part numbers, wiring resistance, oil/coolant/fuel system specs, warning-light thresholds, and calibration evidence; S015 does not provide gauge/sender data
next_action: Map gauge-to-sender pairs and verify calibration before trusting readings or setting warning thresholds.

setting: structural repair dimensions materials and panel bonding or welding settings
applicability: Installed chassis tub and body repairs
blocking_evidence: Chassis identity, material thickness/specification, repair history, original drawings, weld/bond process specs, jig/datum dimensions, corrosion state, and specialist repair source; S028 can target Ford GT Program folders but is not itself a repair procedure
next_action: Do not cut, weld, bond, or straighten structure until identity, materials, datum references, and repair procedure are verified.
